testcase.name: US-005: Performance Metrics Dashboard › Real-time Metrics Updates › should display real-time metrics with 5-second update intervals

failure.message: us-005-performance-metrics.spec.ts:29:9 should display real-time metrics with 5-second update intervals

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › us-005-performance-metrics.spec.ts:29:9 › US-005: Performance Metrics Dashboard › Real-time Metrics Updates › should display real-time metrics with 5-second update intervals
TimeoutError: page.waitForURL: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. =========================== logs =========================== waiting for navigation to "**/admin/**" until "load" ============================================================
at pages/AdminPage.ts:18
16 | 17 | // Wait for redirect to admin dashboard > 18 | await this.page.waitForURL('**/admin/**', { timeout: 10000 }); | ^ 19 | 20 | // Verify admin access 21 | await this.page.waitForSelector('[data-testid="admin-nav"]', { timeout: 5000 }); at AdminPage.loginAsAdmin (/Users/lechristopherblackwell/Desktop/Codeblackwell/BetterPrompts/e2e/phase8/pages/AdminPage.ts:18:21) at /Users/lechristopherblackwell/Desktop/Codeblackwell/BetterPrompts/e2e/phase8/us-005-performance-metrics.spec.ts:14:5
TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'disconnect')
23 | 24 | test.afterEach(async () => { > 25 | await wsHelper.disconnect(); | ^ 26 | }); 27 | 28 | test.describe('Real-time Metrics Updates', () => { at /Users/lechristopherblackwell/Desktop/Codeblackwell/BetterPrompts/e2e/phase8/us-005-performance-metrics.spec.ts:25:20
